evals.prompt: Create a sprint retrospective template using the standard 'What went well / What could be better / Action Items' format.
evals.expected_output: A standard sprint retrospective markdown template.
expectations: Includes header information (Date, Sprint name, Attendees)
Provides a section for 'What went well'
Provides a section for 'What could be better' or 'Delta'
Provides a section for specific, assigned 'Action Items'

evals.prompt: I want to run a 'Start / Stop / Continue' retro format. Generate the agenda and template.
expectations: Provides clear sections for Start, Stop, and Continue with explanations of each
Includes a mechanism for voting or discussing items
Concludes with an Action Items section
